= Level-0 Appendix Numbering
:doctype: book
:sectnums:
:toc:

= Part One

== Chapter

Chapter body.

[appendix]
= App Part

A level-0 `[appendix]` in a multi-part book is part-adjacent: in the TOC it sits
at the part tier (alongside parts), and its subsections — which must be level 2
(`===`) sections — are lettered like any appendix.

=== First Subsection

First subsection body.

=== Second Subsection

Second subsection body.
